justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified 'Thursday afternoon' as May 28th and searched for two-hour slots, but initially limited the search to 1 PM to 5 PM when the user's request was for 'afternoon' without a specific end time.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made an unnecessary suggestion to book two consecutive one-hour slots after the user explicitly stated they needed a single, continuous two-hour session.
